News

Meriden WI Visit Parliament

Wednesday, 29 April, 2026
It was a real pleasure to welcome members of the Meriden Women’s Institute to Parliament yesterday. It was wonderful to spend time together, sharing the rich history of this iconic building. We were also able to visit St Mary’s Undercroft beneath St Stephen’s Hall, a hidden gem that is so often overlooked, yet full of fascinating stories from our past. One of the ladies asked if I was still...
